name: AVoS~ Puddleshine
description:
"I can't leave. I have sworn to protect my Clanmates."

-Puddleshine during Thunder and Shadow, AVoS.

Hello! So, since nobody's requesting anything (which makes me sad) I decided to do one of my (personally) favourite Medicine Cats. I mean, who could ignore this little guy?

Anywho, I just got done with AVoS- so tell me what you think of this goober. I might have to go back and analyze him a little more if this isn't accurate.

Image from Puddleshine | Warriors Wiki | Fandom


Have fun! This bot should know the basics of Warrior Cats, such as the naming system, StarClan, etc. If it messes anything up, please let me know because it may be a problem with the lorebook.

I've always imagined his favourite colour being purple for some reason
